skill-radar.title: skill-radar event
skill-radar.description: A summary of a new or updated Claude Code skill, published when a SKILL.md commit is analyzed.

skill_name.description: Name extracted from the SKILL.md heading, e.g. "daily-haiku".

status.description: Whether this is a newly added skill or an update to an existing one.

one_liner.description: Single-sentence summary starting with a verb.

summary.description: 2-4 sentence description of what the skill does.

what_changed.description: What changed in this commit. Null for new skills.

skill_path.description: Path to the SKILL.md file within the repo, e.g. ".claude/skills/daily-haiku/SKILL.md".
